description:
Deep antagonistic quality review of `hx-prose` (T4-77). Unique to HELiX — healthcare content display wrapper.

Review `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-prose/`.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, content slot typing, size/spacing variant props if any
2. Accessibility — styled HTML content inside must be accessible: headings in order, links have text, images have alt, tables have headers, axe-core pass (note: axe may not scan slot content through Shadow DOM — verify test approach)
3. Tests — heading hierarchy styles, link styles, code blocks, tables, blockquotes, lists, images
4. Storybook — full rich text demo with all HTML elements, typography scale
5. CSS — ALL typography values use `--hx-*` tokens (font-size, line-height, spacing), no hardcoded values, healthcare-appropriate spacing and readability (min 1.5 line-height for body copy), CSS parts
6. Performance — bundle < 3KB (it's just CSS)
7. Drupal — wraps WYSIWYG output, compatible with CKEditor output structure

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-prose/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-prose — T4-77 antagonistic quality review
